features.featureTitle: Redesign frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to exactly match the layout shown in image-13.png. The screen must have a dark background and display the following sections top to bottom: (1) A header row with back arrow, title 'Resultado da Análise', and subtitle 'Análise técnica de candles'; (2) Two side-by-side dark tiles — left tile shows a clock icon, 'TEMPO' label, the countdown timer in large bold white (e.g., '00:36'), and 'restante' subtitle; right tile shows a clock icon, 'ENTRAR ÀS' label, the entry time in large bold cyan/teal (e.g., '20:32'), and 'horário de entrada' subtitle; (3) A large full-width green banner for COMPRA (showing '↗ COMPRA' in large bold white text) or red banner for VENDA (showing '↙ VENDA'), with 'Tendência: ALTA • Confiança: 95%' on one line and a 'Força: forte' badge centered below it; (4) A 2×2 grid of dark tiles: top-left shows 'Tendência' label with a colored arrow icon and 'ALTA' value in green (or 'BAIXA' in red), top-right shows 'Precisão' label with a target icon and the precision percentage/value in cyan, bottom-left shows 'Volume' label with a bar chart icon and the volume value (e.g., 'Baixo') in purple, bottom-right shows 'Time Frame' label with a clock icon, the timeframe value (e.g., 'M1') in amber/orange bold, and a subtitle (e.g., '1 min/vela'); (5) Below the grid, display the uploaded chart image as a full-width (or near full-width) thumbnail with support/resistance overlay lines drawn on it. All text must be in Portuguese (Brazil).

Update the chart thumbnail display in Results.tsx so the uploaded screenshot is shown as a large, full-width (or near full-width) image below the 2×2 info grid — matching the reference design in image-13.png where the chart occupies the lower portion of the screen. Remove any previous small corner thumbnail placement. Retrieve the image data URL from sessionStorage under the 'chartImage' key and render it with the ChartOverlay component so support (green dashed) and resistance (red dashed) lines are drawn on top.

Update the Tendência tile in the 2×2 grid of Results.tsx to display a colored upward/downward arrow icon inline with the ALTA or BAIXA label — green arrow for ALTA, red arrow for BAIXA — matching the visual style in image-13.png. Update the Precisão tile to display its value (percentage or Baixa/Média/Alta label) in cyan/teal text. Update the Volume tile to display its value in purple text. Update the Time Frame tile to display the timeframe value (M1/M3/M5) in amber/orange bold text with a subtitle line below it (e.g., '1 min/vela' for M1, '3 min/vela' for M3, '5 min/vela' for M5).

Update the signal banner in Results.tsx to display inline within the banner: the signal arrow and label ('↗ COMPRA' or '↙ VENDA') in large bold white text, a middle line showing 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%', and a third line showing a centered pill badge 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]' — all within the green (COMPRA) or red (VENDA) full-width banner. This matches the layout visible in image-13.png. The banner must span the full width of the screen with generous vertical padding.
